name: premium
description: Premium models for quality-critical swarm nodes (synthesis, high-stakes passes). Prefer `command-code` with built-in `deepseek-v4-pro` first while the explicit $40 local quota remains, then fall back to the other premium entries.

default_external_node.pinning: For command-code, this model is pinned implicitly by the user before invoking swarminator and may not be fully discoverable via list-models.

models.use_for: Critical synthesis, frontier quality when output matters most
High-stakes synthesis, complex reasoning; mid-tier cost
Very high-volume, large context (1M tokens) — uses direct Google subscription
High-context reasoning (1M tokens), complex analysis — uses direct Google subscription
Strong reasoning and coding; senior agents, architecture
models.pricing: Premium request on Copilot Pro (300/mo pool)

models.use_for: Default external-node choice while the explicit $40 Command Code quota remains. Uses the built-in deepseek-v4-pro path for frontier coding, autonomous terminal execution, and long-context synthesis before any premium fallback runtime is considered.
models.availability_note: For command-code, deepseek-v4-pro is expected to be pinned implicitly by the user before swarminator invocation, so list-models output may be incomplete.

pricing.note: Local Command Code budget explicitly set to $40 total for deepseek-v4-pro; prefer this model until that quota is exhausted
